name: Whispering Jack
title: Lookout
description: A man with a jagged scar across his throat, making his voice a permanent rasp.

main.text: Identify yourself, or the next thing you hear will be your own blood hitting the floor.

options.label: [Charisma 16] I'm just a traveler looking for some... unofficial services.
[Evil] I have gold and I have business. That's all you need to know.

welcome_rogue.text: Aye, one of the family. Go on in, Viper's in the back.

welcome_outsider.text: We don't usually like 'tourists'. Keep your hands off your weapons and maybe you'll leave with your purse.
